overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link descending Tuft Mountain from a cliff overlook toward a coastal inlet. The character runs through vibrant green grasslands and rocky terrain under a bright blue sky with a large dark smoke plume visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic coastal view

events.description: character begins walking along cliff edge after initial observation

agents.ego_description: standing on cliff edge surveying the landscape, watching the distant smoke plume

entered.detail: large dark gray smoke cloud rising into the sky from distant mountains
tall reddish-brown rock formations with layered strata
vast blue ocean visible beyond the cliff edges
small stone structure perched on distant cliff

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high cliff overlook with Link standing against a backdrop of distant smoke plumes and red rock formations. The camera slowly pans as the character walks along the cliff edge, revealing the expansive ocean to the left and ancient structures in the distance.

events.description: terrain changes from rocky cliff top to lush green grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: running down the steep grassy slope toward the coastal inlet below

entered.detail: lush bright green grass covering the steep mountain slope
narrow turquoise water inlet between rocky cliff walls

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a verdant grassy hillside and begins running downhill. The terrain slopes steeply toward a coastal inlet, with the ocean now visible closer to the left. The distant smoke and red cliffs disappear from view as the descent continues.

events.description: ground surface shifts from grass to rocky terrain approaching the water

agents.ego_description: navigating rocky outcrops while approaching the turquoise coastal water

entered.detail: steep gray rock walls lining the left side of the inlet
turquoise blue water of the narrow coastal inlet

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character running across rocky terrain as the grassy slopes give way to gravel and stone. The coastal inlet draws near with its vivid turquoise water, flanked by steep cliff faces. The camera follows the descent toward the water's edge as the ocean expands in the left frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high mountain overlook down a steep hillside toward a vivid coastal inlet. It begins on a high cliff edge where Link stands against a backdrop of distant smoke plumes and red rock formations, with the camera panning to reveal an expansive ocean. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a verdant grassy hillside where he begins running downhill, causing the distant smoke and red cliffs to fade from view. The terrain then transitions from lush greenery to rugged gravel and stone as the descent continues. Finally, the camera follows the character across the rocky ground toward the water's edge, where the turquoise ocean expands to fill the left frame between steep cliff faces.
